creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Franco,

thanks for the port. I committed it which just a few modifications. I took the rc.d script from 3.6, because it offers to change the stop-method. Also i removed the DOCSDIR-files. Most of them are not the final documentation, but source to build it. 

I also tested it against 10.4 and for amd64 and i386.

Thanks for your work. It is now committed :)

Greetings,
Torsten
